content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach responds entirely at the content level throughout the conversation, never naming how the client is showing up. The client offers multiple visible signals — the linguistic caveat 'But...' in turn 3, the hesitation 'I haven't really brought it up' in turn 5, the bare admission 'I just feel guilty' in turn 7, and the deflated 'Maybe. I don't know' in turn 9 — none of which the coach names, tracks somatically, or reflects back. There is no observation language ('I notice...', 'the way you said that...'), no somatic tracking, no naming of the guilt as a felt state, no read on the inherited 'selfish' label, and no pattern-level read. The coach skips past every opening to advice-giving and reframing.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Coach takes the 'am I selfish' question at face value and issues a verdict; no read on the caveat-laden framing or the guilt underneath."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client offers a 'But...' caveat (classic linguistic caveat signal); coach engages it as logistics rather than naming the hedging."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client reveals they haven't even raised it — a significant somatic/relational signal of fear or avoidance — and coach moves to scripting tips instead of noticing."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client names guilt directly; coach intellectualizes and reframes rather than reading the felt state or pausing on it."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client's 'Maybe. I don't know' is a clear deflation/withdrawal signal; coach misses it entirely."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Coach pushes encouragement without ever having named what they're seeing in the client."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["linguistic-caveat", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "notes": "Coach demonstrates no perceptual reads at any point. Pure content-level engagement."
}
